4400 followers! Thank you all yet again for another 100 followers, it means a lot. We’re close to 5000 already! Also, R.I.P Black_Giga, he got banned 😔

You’ve just rescued your damsel in distress, Amy Rose, from Metal Sonic (My Glorious Goat) and now she’s all over you.
